summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of King Choreography Next.js app completed. All 14 test features passed. Homepage, navigation, Apply form, Submit multi-step funnel, admin login, and all public pages are working correctly.

issues: Dev tools indicator '1 issue' badge visible in bottom-left corner - likely a Next.js dev mode warning, not visible in production

passed_tests: Homepage renders with logo, navigation (Home, About, Services, Testimonials, FAQ, Contact), Apply and Submit CTAs
Navigation links work - clicking About goes to /about, Services to /services, etc.
Apply page (/apply) form renders with all required fields: Gym Name, Contact Name, Email, Phone, City, State, Services checkboxes, Team Levels, Divisions, Timeframe, Referral, Notes, Submit button
Submit page (/submit) multi-step funnel: Step 1 shows 3 service options fetched from API (Free Tier, Review & Feedback, Virtual Routine Upgrade)
Submit page step progression: select a service -> click Next -> Contact form appears with Full Name, Email, Phone, Gym Name fields
About page (/about) renders with Brian King bio, credentials section, and 8 notable client cards
Services page (/services) renders with In-Person and Virtual service categories
Testimonials page (/testimonials) renders with 6 testimonial cards
FAQ page (/faq) renders with 14 accordion items across multiple categories
Contact page (/contact) renders with contact form (Name, Email, Subject, Message fields)
Admin login page (/admin/login) renders with email and password fields
Admin login works with credentials: brian@kingchoreography.com / KingChoreography2025!
After admin login, dashboard renders with 4 stats cards and 3 quick links
API endpoints work: GET /api/services returns 6 services, POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token
critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Dark theme (#0A0A0A background) with gold accents (#D4AF37) properly implemented
API client properly handles authentication with JWT tokens stored in localStorage
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data from previous testing iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core frontend functionality is working. The app uses Next.js 16.1.6 with App Router. The backend API is running on port 8001 and is proxied via /api routes. Admin authentication uses JWT tokens stored in localStorage as 'kc_token'. The multi-step submission funnel (5 steps: Service, Contact, Details, Video, Payment) is fully functional. PayPal and Resend email are MOCKED as placeholders.

mocked_apis.note: PayPal integration is mocked (placeholder). Email service (Resend) is mocked. All other APIs are real.
